samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Right shifter that takes a 1-bit input and outputs an 8-bit shifted value on each rising edge of the clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Initializes the register q to 0. On each rising edge of the clock, it shifts the contents of q to the right by one bit and inserts the new input bit d into the most significant position of the register.</implementation>
</module>
